title: Rei and the Evangelions
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] Rei and the Evangelions             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jun 19, 2010 10:17 pm This sort of popped out in an IRC conversation about Rei's appearances in NME/Rebuild. Rei seems to be associated with the Evangelions in a bizarre fashion this time around. We know that she was a partial clone of Yui with Lilith's soul (or a part of it) in the original series, possessed of an army of duplicate bodies that hung around in a tank giggling creepily. So far, Rebuild Rei has shown things we're familiar with. She has- 1. Has demonstrated the same "phantom appearance" properties as old Rei- appearing at the start of 1.0 in the same fashion as she did in Episode 01. 2. Had been injured thanks to Eva-00 going nuts, a la the original series. She has the same personality as old Rei, although 2.0 had her change for the better all of a sudden. But she's also shown things not seen in the original series 1. Rei turned up inside Eva-01 after Shinji zonked out in the Sachiel fight. It's not exactly the distorted version of Rei 1 Shinji saw in Episode 14, but whatever it is, it sure is pretty damn creepy. It comes right after a strange conversation between Yui and Gendo about what to name their child. Rei starts to talk after Yui's laugh, and right after Rei says, "No, Ayanami Rei", this thing pops up. Creepiness aside, what in the world is Rei 1 or her NME equivalent doing inside Eva-01? Gendo knows Yui is in Eva-01, and he says so in 2.0 when Yui rejects the dummy plug. So what's Rei doing in there, popping up and approaching Shinji on cue? 2. During the Bardiel incident, there's this image of Rei that approaches Asuka a second before she's smeared with blue Angel goop. Relevant horrors in this thread . One thing that might explain all this madness is that Rei is actually acting as a sort of super-soul for all the Evangelions. It might explain her appearances in both Eva-01 and Eva-03. If she has Lilith's soul, as in the old series, she would serve as a mother to all the pilots. There might be a kind of feedback loop by which Rei/Lilith puppets all the Evangelions. The so-called "contract" with Lilith might be just that- Lilith allows Nerv to control the Evangelions in return for exterminating the Angels. Mari synchs with Eva-02 just as well as Asuka Shikinami because she's using the Eva to synch with Lilith, rather than Asuka's mother. Yui is in Eva-01 causing it to be especially protective of Shinji, but her presence is probably dependent on Lilith in some manner. (During the"Give me Wings" sequence in 2.0, there's a shot of Lilith's face. What is being implied here now that Eva-01 is transforming into something new?) Each Rei instance could be seen as an instance of quantum mechanics, with Chibi-Rei possibly representing Dummy System copies like NAveryW suggested. (Uhh...excuse me while I get the rest of my thoughts in order...it's quite a mess...)

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sat Jun 19, 2010 10:21 pm Does this mean that the Rei with purple eyes from the Q trailer is the Rei inside Eva-01's min-- er, body?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jun 19, 2010 10:23 pm Maybe it is, yeah...or maybe it is the Rei inside Eva-02, with the two Chibi-Reis being part of the beast mode/ dummy system.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jun 19, 2010 10:29 pm Wow, when I heard you mentioning this theory in the IRC, I was seriously "wtf"ing. But now that I've read it, I'm impressed; this might actually be it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jun 19, 2010 10:32 pm You remembered the Gendo and Yui conversation wrong. Gendo and Yui have their episode 20-style talk on naming, Yui laughs. After Yui's laugh, Rei goes into "Ayanami Shinji, Ikari Rei" babbling, then when she goes "No. Ayanami Rei." it cuts to the floating Rei-1-like figure. The 1.01/1.11 script(s) flat-out state first it's Yui's up until the laugh. Then it switches to Rei talking. Things are confusing with Hayashibara voicing both, I know. Other than that, I love this idea and I'm glad we had this conversation. This is an interesting way for Lilith to be more "universal", especially in regards to the pilots. (And a partial explanation for how the pilots synch with the Evas in the NME-verse!) Relevant discussion since it was phrased better than I could rephrase things: IRC Convo wrote: UrsusArctos: Rebuild makes it especially crazy, doesn't it? SSD: Oh jeez yeah. We're seemingly in Eva-01(?) when the hell train happens but then BAM Rei-1 shows up. UrsusArctos: And in Eva-03 too. With nightmare giggling! SSD: I wonder if that means there is a little Rei in each plug as a dummy. SSD: Yeah. @_@ UrsusArctos: Or is Rei somehow connected to each Eva in Rebuild as a "master soul"? Think of it. Rei is the mother of all mankind, through Lilith. Yui is in Eva-01, but Yui aside, the real big momma is Lilith, incarnate as Rei. SSD: Reichu claimed that Rei isn't necessarily Lilith though in Rebuild. UrsusArctos: That's true. But this is a theory... SSD: which is a good point but I find it hard to believe Rei ISN'T. UrsusArctos: Sort of like what happened to Rits. :P SSD: What with the red GNR at the end of 2.0

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Jun 19, 2010 11:14 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Gendo and Yui have their episode 20-style talk on naming, Yui laughs. After Yui's laugh, Rei goes into "Ayanami Shinji, Ikari Rei" babbling, then when she goes "No. Ayanami Rei." it cuts to the floating Rei-1-like figure. The 1.01/1.11 script(s) flat-out state first it's Yui's up until the laugh. Then it switches to Rei talking. Things are confusing with Hayashibara voicing both, I know.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 20, 2010 12:26 am Kuma: If you don't end up hitting the nail on the head with some of this come the release of Q and Final, I'll eat my hat. All of DOES make a wacky and bizzare amount of sense. Also, the part about Eva-01 and the Seele snake: Related? http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2364 (First post in thread, an old Newtype transcript one.)

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Jun 20, 2010 1:07 am Too much speculation in that article, although he's right about Kaworu turning heads (appearing in a coffin on the moon, no less!) There's a lot of material linking serpents with old middle eastern traditions that the Bible borrowed from, so trying to link the Serpent-Apple logo with anything is likely to need its own thread. Not to mention the risk of going too far into PRS.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Jun 20, 2010 4:05 am I absolutely didn't notice the Rei inside Bardiel, it must be my blindness (or the fact that it's annoying sliding the movie with the PS3) but it's really something interesting but I have my doubts about the presence of some kind of Lilith/Rei inside all the EVAs: The face that it was shown must had to do with Bardiel itself and not the EVA considering what was happening; yet I don't see any link between Rei and Bardiel unless it's a form that Bardiel has choosen after inspecting Asuka's memories (let me look liker her hated rival in love). The "Rei-I" that Shinji saw after the battle with Sachiel in the Rebuild could be connected to some feedback memory of Rei present inside of the 01 just like what could have happened inside the 00 in the TV series (actually he seems to be dream about her in the bed but that could have been just the conclusion of a "contamination" started in the EVA-01) Something that I find kinda weird is Mari synchronizing with the EVA-02 that apparently simply received back her removed core and not a new one unless the organization that support her managed to sneak a new core for her (with which soul? Have they managed to recover the 05's one?) The synchronization with Lilith theory could help in this matter but if that's true then there wouldn't be a need for souls inside the cores (actually if we accept this theory we could conclude that 00 could not have a soul at all), Mari seems to be able to operate 02 just too well to leave space for additional synchronization methods.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Jun 20, 2010 10:10 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: The face that it was shown must had to do with Bardiel itself and not the EVA considering what was happening; yet I don't see any link between Rei and Bardiel unless it's a form that Bardiel has choosen after inspecting Asuka's memories (let me look liker her hated rival in love).

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jun 20, 2010 11:42 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: I absolutely didn't notice the Rei inside Bardiel, it must be my blindness

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sun Jun 20, 2010 11:45 am You may well be right, but I'd like to point out that we're still making the assumption that it's Rei's face in Unit 03. It could be Asuka's, Rei's, or someone else's entirely. Other than that, I think it's just as possible as anything else being speculated.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Jun 21, 2010 1:52 am UrsusArctos wrote: That's the funny part. Asuka doesn't hate Rei nearly as much this time around. I can only expect that the Rei inside Eva-03 got flushed into Asuka by Bardiel, or got hijacked like the Eva itself. Whatever the reason for the image turning up, is it a coincidence that Rei appears rushing towards Shinji after he zonks out in Eva-01's berserk rampage and then appears again rushing at Asuka when Bardiel hijacks Eva-03 and starts handling it like a berserker?

[]:             Quote Post by Lonecow12 » Wed Jun 23, 2010 4:28 pm I really like this theory. I love Lilith Rei a lot more then regular Rei in the original series, so if she gets a bigger part early on I will be a happy camper. It makes the Shinji x Rei relationship a lot more appealing too if he falls in love with a God instead of a clone of his mom. Slightly less creepy. The thing is, Rebuild seems to be doing a better job of "here is our strange new sci-fi idea, and here is how it works" where in NGE we are just expected to accept "yeah we cloned her soul, but we aren't going to tell you how". If this theory is true, then they better figure out an interesting way to show us how this contract was formed, because I just don't see them all taking Lilith out for a fancy dinner and making this proposal. Some freaky mind melding had to be going on to communicate with her.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Jun 25, 2010 10:27 am Well, I'm gonna be leaving this here in the absence of a better place to keep it. Maybe it deserves its own thread, but I'm sleepy and I have college work to do now... Zeruel eats Eva-00, with Rei inside the Eva, and turns into something even more grotesque than normal. However, when Shinji goes to recover Rei, there appears to be nothing else inside Zeruel's core. Just Rei. Where is Eva-00's soul? Unless Sarai walked into Zeruel's core and stole Eva-00's soul before Shinji tried to summon Rei out of it, the only soul that was ever in Eva-00 was Rei herself. If Rei was actually remote-controlling her Eva via the long route (Lilith), there might have been no need to have a soul in the Eva at all. The berserk incident could have been triggered by Rei herself this time. Main thing here: There was no soul in Eva-00 except for Rei Ayanami. I'll leave you with this for now.

[]:             Quote Post by Lonecow12 » Fri Jun 25, 2010 10:36 am Or maybe they just merged into one and Rei in Q will be Lilith Rei the entire time. I hope. I'm just scared we have gotten too wild with our theories. I don't think there would be any real way to explain this theory in a movie and like I said before they seem more intent on people walking away with a pretty good understanding of what is happening at all times. The Rei is Lilith is Yui thing might just be way over most people's heads.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Fri Jun 25, 2010 12:23 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Main thing here: There was no soul in Eva-00 except for Rei Ayanami.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Jun 25, 2010 2:03 pm I just figured that Rei's soul merged with the other Rei within the Eva (Ala the transition to Rei III in the original continuity). Alternatively, it's entirely possible that due to the semi-mental imagery, we only saw Rei inside the core because Rei was the only thing Shinji was reaching for. After all, where the hell is ZERUEL'S soul?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Jun 25, 2010 3:51 pm AuraTwilight wrote: After all, where the hell is ZERUEL'S soul?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jun 27, 2010 12:00 am SaltyJoe wrote: A rainbow appeared when Unit-01 shot Zer with eye-beams, so it's likely that he was dead by then.

 Zeruel eats Eva-00, with Rei inside the Eva, and turns into something even more grotesque than normal. Unless Sarai walked into Zeruel's core and stole Eva-00's soul before Shinji tried to summon Rei out of it, the only soul that was ever in Eva-00 was Rei herself. If Rei was actually remote-controlling her Eva via the long route (Lilith), there might have been no need to have a soul in the Eva at all. The berserk incident could have been triggered by Rei herself this time. Main thing here: There was no soul in Eva-00 except for Rei Ayanami. I'll leave you with this for now.
